# Christian Zimmerman - chriszimmerman.org

> Army vet. 25+ years in the auto industry. Solo operator building AI-powered ventures from Wake County, NC.

## About
Christian "Chris" Zimmerman is a builder and operator based in Wake County, North Carolina. U.S. Army veteran. Career spans military vehicle mechanic (2000), shop manager, and service operations. Now building multiple AI-powered ventures as a solo operator.

## Ventures
- My Everyday Driver (myeverydaydriver.com) - Consumer automotive advisory. Free tools, expert guidance, honest vehicle decisions. No commissions.
- Operator Stack (zbdos.com) - AI operating system for solo operators. One vault, one system, persistent context across every session.

## Services
- Advisory Sessions (via My Everyday Driver) - repair opinions, estimate reviews, purchase guidance. From $49.

## Content
- Essays: https://chriszimmerman.org/essays/
- MED Blog (automotive): https://myeverydaydriver.com/blog
- Operator Briefing (systems/AI): https://zbdos.com/blog/
